title: Conputer
description: Replaces Lecterns, and books with computer related things
body: Replaces lecterns, books, book and quills, and enchanted books with computers, files, writable files, and zipped files respectively.![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6047fc648c01b3f708bca39557cc38b5ffcd3d4f.png)
